productDisplayName: Baggit Women Zanzil Taj Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece inspired by the clutch bag, is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cm Crafted from genuine leatherette opens with a press button Five card holders on the left side and four on the right One id card holder and two pockets on the left One compartment on the right A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
